cpu_detail: NEC uPD70116C-8, socketed, max mode, 4 MHz, 0 waits
author: Martin Donlon (wickerwaka), with Claude
notes: V20 flags-masks carry over: V30 undefined-flag behavior is bit-exact with the V20 (docs/facts/undefined_flags.md).
Odd-indexed cases are prefetched (63 C0 preload); even-indexed start from an empty queue.
No IN/port-read opcodes in v0.1 (harness IOR data fixed).

Mission J growth: moffs A0-A3, sreg MOVs 8C/8E, LDEA 8D, TRANS D7, CVTBW/CVTWL 98/99, string singles A4/A5/AA/AB/AC/AD, REP F3AA/F3A4 (CW 0-3), segment-prefixed 26.8B/2E.8B/36.8B/3E.8B. Prefixed forms pop one F per prefix byte; their windows span [prefix F .. next-instruction F] and contain interior F pops.

8F /0 mod3 ghost-read address is a documented don't-care (see the 8F opcode entry's dont_care field). The undocumented register-destination POP (8F C0-C7) writes no register - it only does SP += 2 and issues one stack read whose word is discarded. On silicon that read's committed ADDRESS (bus col) and its data are stale internal EA/address-latch state carried in from pre-window execution history (the injection stub: load routine + 63 C0 preload + prefetch stream); deterministic and stable across re-runs but with no relation to the injected architectural state, and unreproducible from an injected start. Comparators must treat the address+data on the mod3 MEMR row as don't-care (sw/check_core.py dontcare_cells).

F7.6.note: divide-trap cases vector through IVT 0 to 0000:0400 (handler far-jump in initial.ram); pushed PC = address after the instruction incl. prefixes

0F20.note: ADD4S with CL limited to 1-6 digits

F3AA.note: REP prefix + STOSB, CW restricted to 0-3

F3A4.note: REP prefix + MOVSB, CW restricted to 0-3

F6.7.note: IDIV rm8; trap cases vector through IVT 0 like F7.6

F7.7.note: IDIV rm16; trap cases vector through IVT 0 like F7.6

8F.0.note: POP r/m16. mem forms (mod 0/1/2) pop a real word to memory. mod3 (0xC0-0xC7) is the undocumented register-destination alias: it writes NO register, only SP += 2, and issues one stack read whose word is discarded.

dont_care.row: the single MEMR row (the discarded mod3 stack read)
dont_care.reason: Architecturally inert: the read word is discarded (dest reg never written). The chip drives the read at stale internal EA/address-latch state from pre-window execution history (injection stub load routine + 63 C0 preload + prefetch stream) - deterministic and stable across re-runs, but no (seg<<4)+reg+const formula fits it and only PS/CS (fetch-stream shape) perturbs it. A backdoor-injected core has no such history and drives the modeled SS:SP. See docs/notes/closure_checkpoint.md 8F.0 section and sw/check_core.py dontcare_cells().
